overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded assassin exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex at dusk. The character ascends wide ceremonial staircases, passes through a monumental gate with hieroglyphics, crosses an inner courtyard, climbs a narrow decorated stairway, and explores a sunlit rooftop terrace with panoramic views before descending back down.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide ceremonial staircase of ancient Egyptian temple

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase toward the temple gate at a steady pace

entered.detail: broad stone steps leading up to the temple entrance
tall palm trees silhouetted against the evening sky
smooth sandstone wall with block construction
monumental gate structure at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide ceremonial staircase flanked by stone walls, with palm trees visible against the darkening sky. The torch-lit path leads toward a monumental gate structure at the top of the stairs.

events.description: passes through the monumental gate into the inner temple courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate and entering the inner temple courtyard

entered.detail: large stone gate with carved hieroglyphics on pillars
decorated pillars with colorful Egyptian reliefs
lit torches mounted on the walls
flat stone paving of the inner courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a monumental gate adorned with hieroglyphic pillars and lit torches, transitioning from the open staircase into a more enclosed inner courtyard with detailed stone carvings.

events.description: turns toward the narrow staircase on the right side of the courtyard

agents.ego_description: crossing the courtyard and approaching the narrow side staircase

notable_agents.action: sitting on a stone bench against the wall

entered.detail: walls covered in painted Egyptian reliefs and figures
large wooden door with metal studs
stone seating against the courtyard wall
entrance to a narrow staircase between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the torch-lit inner courtyard, passing an NPC seated on a stone bench, and approaches a narrow staircase entrance flanked by walls with colorful hieroglyphic paintings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow enclosed staircase with colorful decorative bands

events.description: enters the narrow enclosed stairway with decorated walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the narrow staircase with green and yellow decorative trim on the walls

entered.detail: steep stone steps in a confined passageway
walls with green, yellow, and blue decorative bands and patterns
narrow slit windows in the stairwell walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed stairwell with steep stone steps and walls decorated with colorful green and yellow bands, ascending toward an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with cushions, rugs, and panoramic view

events.description: emerges from dark staircase into bright sunlight on the rooftop terrace
stops to look at the panoramic view of palm trees and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: exploring the rooftop terrace, examining the view and walking around the furnishings

entered.detail: open terrace area with decorative flooring and furnishings
red and orange woven rugs covering the terrace floor
large ceramic storage urns with handles
fabric canopy supported by wooden poles
wooden trays with fruits and bread
low stone seating with fabric cushions

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark stairwell into bright sunlight, the character explores a rooftop terrace furnished with patterned rugs, large urns, and food platters. The terrace offers a panoramic view of palm trees, gardens, and distant mountains under a clear blue sky.

events.description: turns around and begins descending the staircase
exits the staircase into a narrow outdoor alley with vegetation

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs and walking through the narrow alleyway

notable_agents.action: walking up the stairs, passing the player character

entered.detail: confined walkway between stone walls
irregular stone paving in the alley
bushes and plants growing along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character descends the narrow staircase, passing an NPC coming up the stairs, and exits into a dimly lit narrow alleyway with stone walls and vegetation, returning to the lower level of the temple complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the torch-lit depths of a ceremonial temple complex up to a sun-drenched rooftop before descending back into the shadows. It begins with an ascent up a wide ceremonial staircase flanked by stone walls and palm trees, moving toward a monumental gate adorned with hieroglyphic pillars. As the camera passes through the gate, the scene shifts into an enclosed inner courtyard where the character crosses torch-lit stone paths and enters a narrow, steep stairwell decorated with colorful green and yellow bands. The environment then opens abruptly from the dark enclosure into the bright sunlight of a rooftop terrace furnished with rugs and urns, revealing a panoramic view of distant mountains and gardens. Finally, the camera descends the narrow stairs, passing a fellow traveler before exiting into a dimly lit alleyway of stone and vegetation.
